name: Bikhray Moti
overview: ‘Bikhray Moti’ is the story of a young girl, Aiza who has dreams of making a better future for herself. But fate has something else in store for her, a promise to her dying sister takes her on a completely different path, and her mission becomes saving the lives of her nephews and niece from their heartless father, Zulfi and the evils of the society.

trailers.title: BIKHRAY MOTI  | Teaser 1 |  Coming Soon Only on ARY Digital
